About Us

On Site. Every Time.

Green Zebra gets your project built. Brett Archer manages everything: consents, contractors, council, procurement, and the appointment and management of architects, engineers and other professionals. From day one through to CCC sign-off. One person. One number. No gaps.

With 950+ projects delivered across residential, commercial, industrial and community sectors, Green Zebra works with property developers, private owners, community organisations, education providers and local government bodies. Whatever the scale or sector, the commitment is the same: clear advice, active management and a project delivered to scope, on time and on budget.

Resource consent strategy, professional team appointment and procurement come first — establishing the right structure and the right people from day one. From there, Brett is on site and across every detail, acting as your single point of contact across consultants, contractors, council and funders through every stage of construction and handover.

Bachelor of Landscape Architecture (BLA)
Postgraduate Diploma in Project Management (PGDPM)
PMI best-practice delivery framework
950+ projects completed across New Zealand
What We Do

Our Services

Full project lifecycle management, from initial planning and consent through to construction delivery and sign-off.

🏗️
Project Delivery
  • Project & programme management
  • Design & build procurement (RFT/RFP)
  • Engineer to the contract
  • Budget, contract & variation management
  • Professional team appointment & coordination
  • Progress payment certification
📋
Consenting & Compliance
  • Resource consent strategy, planning & management
  • Building consent management
  • Auckland Council compliance & CCC sign-off
  • Statutory obligations management
🔨
Construction & Refurbishment
  • Residential & commercial new build
  • Building refurbishment & fit-out
  • Industrial plant installation & civil works
  • Pre-sale property preparation
  • Repairs & maintenance programmes
🌿
Planning & Asset Management
  • 10-year property planning (10YPP)
  • Maintenance planning & scheduling
  • Total cost of ownership planning
  • Sustainability & environmental scoping
  • Funding application support & funder engagement
Track Record

Selected Projects

A selection of projects across Auckland. Every one delivered with Brett as the single point of contact.

~$5.3M · Community
West Auckland RDA Covered Riding Facility

New covered arena, stables, civil road upgrade, dry ponds, carpark, water jump and cross-country course. D&B procurement, resource consent, building consent, engineer to contract. Solar and environmental scoping included.

Civil WorksD&B ProcurementCommunityEngineer to Contract
est. $300M · Industrial
Hobsonville Marine Industry Precinct

Redevelopment of the former Hobsonville Air Base into a world-class superyacht and marine industry precinct. 100,000m² industrial buildings, 15,000m² mixed-use office, vessel launching systems. Resource consent across multiple agencies, professional team procurement.

IndustrialResource ConsentMulti-AgencyProcurement
$6-7M p.a. · Education
UNITEC New Zealand: 11-Year Facilities Programme

Annual construction, refurbishment and relocation programmes. Includes Waitakere City Library joint venture ($36M, three multi-storey buildings), NZ Architects Award-winning building, veterinary hospital and student learning complex. 25-70 projects per year, 640+ staff relocations.

EducationProgramme ManagementNew BuildRefurbishment
$4.5M · Education
Rangitoto College 10-Year Property Plan

Full 10YPP across 134 classrooms. Delivered dance studio, 22 science labs, gym upgrade, reroofing, sportsfields, power infrastructure and carpark. All procurement and delivery to Ministry of Education requirements.

Education10YPPMoEInfrastructure
$150-275M · Government
Westhaven Marina, Auckland City Council

Waterfront master plan for Auckland City Council. Marina expansion, reclamation, seawall extensions and lifting bridges. Resource consent strategy across 12 separate consents. International EOI/RFP procurement of multi-disciplinary design team.

GovernmentWaterfrontResource ConsentProcurement
Commercial · Industrial
Penrose Industrial Fit-Out & Plant Installation

Complex industrial upgrade including structural review, HV electrical reticulation, fire compliance, drainage, resource consent for new tanks, and full 3-storey office block refurbishment.

IndustrialResource ConsentStructuralElectrical
Residential · Auckland
Alberton Rd Dual Apartment Refurbishment

Internal refurbishment of two apartments including new bathrooms, kitchens, painting, electrical and plumbing upgrades, and polished concrete floors. Completed ahead of schedule.

ResidentialRefurbishmentFast Track
Community · Kumeu
Kumeu Childcare: Post-Vehicle Impact Repair

Emergency structural repair and upgrade after vehicle drove through the building. New shopfront, structural reinforcement, and playground area upgrade delivered under time pressure.

Structural RepairEmergency WorksCommunity
Residential · Herne Bay
Shelly Beach Rd House Refurbishment

Full house refurbishment including exterior repairs, roof works, new kitchen and bathroom, and complete downstairs upgrade. Brett managed all trades directly.

ResidentialRefurbishmentR&M
Residential · Kingsland
New North Rd Pre-Sale Refurbishment

Pre-sale preparation including weatherboard repairs, new kitchen, bathroom, and full interior and exterior repaint. Delivered on time and on budget.

Pre-SaleRefurbishmentOn Budget
How We Work

Our Approach

We work directly with our clients — practically, fairly and with a relentless focus on results. Every project gets the same rigorous treatment: thorough scoping and feasibility, tight budget management, rigorous contractor procurement and oversight, and clear communication at every stage.

We understand construction and development from the ground up, which means we anticipate problems before they arise and keep your project moving forward.

Whether you are developing a new property, managing a 10-year property plan and maintenance programme, undertaking a major building refurbishment, delivering a commercial fit-out, or building large-scale civil or industrial infrastructure — Green Zebra has the experience, the networks and the discipline to deliver.

The Difference

Why Green Zebra

Single Point of Contact

Brett manages the entire project: consultants, contractors, council, funders and consent authorities. No gaps, no dropped balls, no costly miscommunications.

On Site & Hands-On

Green Zebra does not manage from a desk. Brett is on site, knows every contractor, and stays fully across every detail from inception through to CCC sign-off.

30+ Years, 950+ Projects

Decades of real-world delivery across residential, commercial, industrial, education, civil and community sectors. PMI-aligned processes, hard-won practical experience.

Get In Touch

Ready to Talk?

Planning a new build, a refurbishment or a civil works package? Give Brett a call or send an email. Straight talk, no obligation.
